# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

# ARM template to create an Virtual Network with Service Endpoint configurations 
parameters:
 - name: location
   type: string
 - name: resourceGroupName
   type: string
 - name: virtualNetworkName
   type: string
   
resources:
- type: "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks@2019-11-01"  # use the latest version of ARM template spec
  name: ${virtualNetworkName}
  dependsOn: []
  apiVersion: "2019-11-01"  
  location: ${location}   
  properties: {}     
    
# Create subnets for Storage and SQL server (Public Endpoint)          
variables:               
 - name: defaultSubnetName       # Define the variables           
 - value: "defaultsubnetname-${uniqueString}"  
            
parameters:         
  location: ${location}   
              
resources:                 
# Create a public IP for outbound connections (Public Endpoint)    
        1:                  
           type : Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses@2019-11-01   # Use the latest version of ARM template spec           
          name : ${defaultSubnetName}-pip   
       dependsOn : []            
        apiVersion:"v1"                   
         location:  ${location}          	                		 	       				     	 			                 					             	   		    						   \t\r                     							                               	} } ]'}'}"         `) ) }}', '')}}}}},'')))))
